word: H318 - אׇחֳרֵין - ʼochŏrêyn - okh-or-ane' - At last

sections.paragraph:
Original: אחרן אחרין

Transliteration: 'ochŏrêyn 'ochŏrên

Phonetic: okh-or-ane'

BDB Definition:

  1. end, outcome
    1. hid part (of cows)
    2. end (of time)
    3. remnant, descendants

Origin: from H317

TWOT entry: 2568c

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
